goal:
(⋀aa asa. (\<not> ia < length asa \<Longrightarrow>
               (asa @ ysa) ! ia = ysa ! (ia - length asa)) \<Longrightarrow>
              \<not> ia < length (aa # asa) \<Longrightarrow>
              ((aa # asa) @ ysa) ! ia =
              ysa ! (ia - length (aa # asa)))
prefix:
lemma "(⋀aa asa. (\<not> ia < length asa \<Longrightarrow>

              ((aa # asa) @ ysa) ! ia =
              ysa ! (ia - length (aa # asa)))"
